description: Dutch court decisions CLI - data.rechtspraak.nl Open Data with local FTS narrowing and an appeal-chain walker

tools.name: courts_list
tools.description: List every Dutch rechtsprekende instantie with PSI URI, full name, afkorting code, type, and Begin/EndDate. Begin/EndDate enable court-succession lookup (Wet Herziening Gerechtelijke Kaart). Returns array of Court.

tools.name: foreign-courts_list
tools.description: Foreign court catalog: ECHR, CJEU, and ~5000 EU member-state courts with PSI URI, multilingual name, and country code. Returns array of ForeignCourt.

tools.name: foreign-decisions_list
tools.description: Bridge from foreign ECLIs (CJEU, ECHR) to old Dutch LJN codes - ~173k entries. Returns array of ForeignDecision.

tools.name: procedures_list
tools.description: Procedure types (cassatie, hoger beroep, kort geding, etc.) with PSI URIs. Returns array of Procedure.

tools.name: relations_list
tools.description: Relation taxonomy: each relation type pairs from/to court tiers and lists the canonical AfhandelingsWijze (disposition outcomes: bekrachtiging, vernietiging, niet ontvankelijk, etc.). Returns array of Relation.

tools.name: subjects_list
tools.description: Subject-area taxonomy with PSI URIs, names, and parent-child hierarchy. Returns array of Subject.

tools.name: uitspraken_get
tools.description: Fetch a single decision by ECLI - returns full RDF metadata plus the inhoudsindicatie summary and the uitspraak body when available. Required: id. Optional: return.

params.name: id
params.description: The ECLI to fetch, e.g. ECLI:NL:HR:2024:1

params.name: return
params.description: META = metadata only (skip body, saves bandwidth on large decisions)

tools.name: uitspraken_image
tools.description: Fetch an embedded image from a decision body by its imagedata identifier. Required: id. Returns the Image.

params.name: id
params.description: Image identifier from an imagedata element inside a decision body

tools.name: uitspraken_search
tools.description: Search the ECLI index by date, court, subject, type. Per IVO 1.15: same-type params are OR-unioned, cross-type params are AND-combined. Local --keyword/--exclude/--phrase/--regex/--procedure flags narrow results against the synced FTS5 index after the API returns. Optional: max (default: 1000), from (default: 0), date (plus 7 more). Returns array of SearchEntry.

params.name: max
params.description: Maximum results per page (server caps at 1000)

params.name: from
params.description: Pagination offset for results beyond max

params.name: date
params.description: Decision date (Uitspraakdatum). One value = exact day; pass twice for a range. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: modified
params.description: Modification date. One value = from that point until now; pass twice for a range. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.

params.name: subject
params.description: Subject area (rechtsgebied) PSI URI. Repeat for multi-subject OR-union.

params.name: creator
params.description: Court (instantie) PSI URI. Repeat for multi-court OR-union.

params.name: type
params.description: Document type: Uitspraak (decision) or Conclusie (A-G conclusion)

params.name: replaces
params.description: Old LJN code. Returns the ECLI(s) that superseded that LJN.

params.name: return
params.description: DOC = only return ECLIs that have a document body (subset)

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort by modification date - ASC oldest-first (default) or DESC newest-first
